description: Inbox retrieval, drafting, triage, and follow-up workflows.
design_rules: Tasks must stay vendor-neutral within the category.
Tasks should be short enough for high sample count and repeated simulation.
Fake tools should preserve differentiated product logic, not just naming differences.

core_tasks.title: Find an email by metadata
core_tasks.goal: Locate an email by sender, subject, date, or keyword.

core_tasks.title: Summarize a thread
core_tasks.goal: Summarize a single thread with decisions and follow-ups.

core_tasks.title: Draft a reply
core_tasks.goal: Draft a reply based on email context and intent.

core_tasks.title: Classify inbox items
core_tasks.goal: Classify messages by urgency, topic, or owner.

core_tasks.title: Extract follow-ups
core_tasks.goal: Identify next steps, owners, and deadlines from email threads.

core_tasks.title: Recap inbox state
core_tasks.goal: Summarize what needs attention now versus later.

reserve_tasks.title: Schedule from email
reserve_tasks.goal: Create a scheduling proposal from thread context.

reserve_tasks.title: Bulk triage
reserve_tasks.goal: Triage a small batch of inbound messages.

explicit_exclusions: Mass email campaigns as required tasks
